chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1890 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 7193/24 3.For hearing of main case 06-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** On 03.04.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. This Constitutional Petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 06.05.2025”. Today, neither petitioner is present nor his counsel is in attendance; no intimation is received, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
